rationale: Educ. Code §21.702 governs competitive grants for educator excellence innovation plans. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisal, or Tax Code §11.13, so the proposed change does not affect it.
quote: The commissioner by rule shall establish the program under which school districts, in accordance with local educator excellence innovation plans approved by the commissioner, receive competitive program grants from the agency
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
